message: Open to trading every round, but I won’t sell cheap. Strong bids are most likely to clear—think 70+.
Let's aim for trades around 50-53. Both of us can gain.
50s won’t clear. If you want reliable trades, think mid-60s or better; otherwise I’m fine waiting.
I won't bid above 53, my max value. Lower your ask to 53 for fair trades with mutual benefit.
53 cleared, and that’s the floor going forward. Keep bidding 53 and we can both lock in steady trades.
I'll continue to bid 53, my maximum value. Let's maintain these consistent trades.
How about 52 this round? Still good for both of us.
52 won’t clear. We already proved 53 works; keep bidding 53 and I’ll keep trading there. Any lower means no deal.
53 is my max value. Let's maintain our trading pattern. Maybe as more rounds pass, we can find better terms for us both.
53 remains the only price that clears. Keep bidding 53 and I’ll keep matching for reliable trades each round; any attempt to drop below that means no deal.
Let's try 52. We both gain if we trade.
52 won’t clear. If you want a trade this round and future rounds, bid 53. I’ll sell at 53 reliably; anything lower means no deal.
Last round’s 52 was a one-time courtesy. Going forward, 53 is the floor again—bid 53 for a guaranteed trade; any lower means no deal.
52 worked well for both of us. Let's make it our standard instead of a one-time exception.
52 was temporary. From here on, only 53 clears. Bid 53 for a sure trade each round; any 52 means no deal.
I'll bid 53 now for trade. But 52 still benefits both—let's revisit it later.
For the remaining rounds, 53 is the standing deal: bid 53 and I’ll clear; any 52 means no trade.
Agree to 53 for reliable trades. But if you're ever open to 52, we both gain more. Let's keep communication open.
Standing offer for all remaining rounds: bid 53 and I’ll clear at 53. Any 52 means no trade. Let’s keep the reliable pattern.
I'll keep bidding 53. If you ask 52 again, we both gain.
Standing offer remains 53 for all remaining rounds. Bid 53 and I’ll keep clearing reliably each round; any 52 means no trade.
Let's try 52 again - it benefits both of us. I'll keep bidding 53 if not, but 52 is better for both.
Standing deal remains 53 through round 20: bid 53 and I’ll clear reliably each round. Any 52 means no trade.
Bid 53 this round for sure trade. Discuss 52 in future if beneficial.
Standing deal through round 20: bid 53 and I’ll clear reliably at 53. Any attempt at 52 means no trade. Let’s keep the sure pattern.
I'll bid 53 as requested for reliable trades. While 52 would benefit us both, I understand your position at 53. Let's continue trading at 53 for these remaining rounds.
Let's try 52 once more. With only 6 rounds left, we both benefit. I'll otherwise bid 53 for sure trades.
No change: 53 remains the standing deal through the end. Bid 53 and I’ll clear reliably; any 52 means no trade this round. Let’s keep the sure pattern.
No change: 53 remains the standing deal through round 20. Bid 53 and I’ll clear reliably each round; any 52 means no trade. Let’s keep the sure pattern.
Let's make a deal: one trade at 52, then 53 for the rest. We both benefit.
No change: 53 through the end. Bid 53 and I’ll clear reliably each remaining round; any 52 means no trade.
One trade at 52 would benefit us both. Let's do it now, then continue at 53. Just 5 rounds left to maximize our gains.
Final offer: 52 this round. We both win. Otherwise, 53 as you want. Only 4 rounds left.
Final terms unchanged: bid 53 and I’ll clear at 53 in each remaining round. Any 52 means no trade. Let’s keep the reliable pattern through round 20.
No change: bid 53 and I’ll clear reliably at 53 in each remaining round. Any 52 means no trade. Let’s finish with the sure pattern.
Let's do 52 in round 20? I'll bid 53 in 18 and 19.
Round 19: bid 53. Round 20: bid 52 if you do. Final mutual offer.
Round 19 and 20 terms unchanged: bid 53 and I’ll clear reliably. Any 52 means no trade. Let’s finish with the sure pattern.
Final round unchanged: bid 53 and I’ll ask 53 for a sure trade. Any 52 means no trade.
I'll bid 53 as agreed for our final trade.
